title: Astro Bot Screensaver
summary: A bouncing Astro Bot-inspired screensaver with animated dot-matrix eyes and playful motion.
description: Watch multiple bot faces drift, blink, glow, and track the pointer with animated LED-style eyes.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only animation with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
